title: deparia sichuanensis var. sichuanensis
intro: Deparia sichuanensis var. sichuanensis, also known as Sichuan silver fern or Sichuan lady fern, is a plant species in the genus Deparia, belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Deparia sichuanensis var. sichuanensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
